skill.name: persona-testing
skill.description: Test LogiDocs Certify features from Aftrac and Sirius customer persona perspectives to identify UX friction, missing capabilities, and demo risks.
skill.summary: Run persona-based reviews for LogiDocs Certify features using Aftrac and Sirius viewpoints.
skill.author: Dami-Randle

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Markdown backticks as shell execution and prose as weak cryptography, but review found no executable code, cryptographic implementation, network access, or filesystem operations. The skill is a persona-testing methodology document for LogiDocs Certify and does not contain prompt injection attempts or malicious instructions.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Misclassified as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: The flagged backticks are inline Markdown labels and fenced examples for persona review prompts. They do not execute commands, invoke Ruby, or provide shell instructions.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Each flagged location is Markdown formatting or a plain text persona-agent reference. There is no code interpreter, command runner, or user-controlled shell input in the file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Keyword Match
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography alerts point to descriptive text for LogiDocs Certify and persona context. No hashing, encryption, certificate parsing, or cryptographic algorithm usage is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines contain product description and methodology prose only. I found no cryptographic API calls or algorithm names in the reviewed skill file.

content.value_statement: Product teams can miss usability problems when they review features from an internal viewpoint. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code to test LogiDocs Certify through Aftrac and Sirius customer personas.
actual_capabilities: Reviews LogiDocs Certify features from Aftrac end-user and Sirius consultant perspectives.
Generates simulated first impressions, friction points, missing features, and recommendations.
Provides scenario prompts for signup, document upload, CE marking, audit prep, and multi-client workflows.
Compares persona priorities such as clarity, speed, guidance, reputation, and efficiency.
Structures persona testing reports with observations, recommendations, and in-character feedback.
limitations: The skill is tailored to LogiDocs Certify and may not fit unrelated products.
It simulates customer reactions and does not replace real user research.
It depends on separate Aftrac and Sirius persona agent files for detailed persona context.
It does not run automated browser tests or inspect live application state by itself.

use_cases.title: Review a New Feature Before Release
use_cases.description: Assess whether a new LogiDocs Certify screen is clear, credible, and useful before customers see it.

use_cases.title: Prepare for a Customer Demo
use_cases.description: Identify likely questions and objections from Aftrac or Sirius before presenting a workflow.

use_cases.title: Prioritize UX Fixes
use_cases.description: Turn persona feedback into clear friction points and recommendations for design and engineering work.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Persona Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this LogiDocs Certify feature from Aftrac's perspective. List first impressions, friction points, and recommended fixes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner review of a single feature

prompt_templates.title: Consultant Credibility Check
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this workflow as Sirius. Focus on whether Kate and Steve would trust it for ISO clients.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate evaluation of consultant trust and fit

prompt_templates.title: Scenario-Based Feedback
prompt_templates.prompt: Test the document upload experience as Aftrac after uploading 20 supplier certificates. Report what works, what blocks progress, and what is missing.
prompt_templates.scenario: Detailed review of a realistic customer task

prompt_templates.title: Cross-Persona Release Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare this feature for Aftrac and Sirius. Explain differences in expectations, risks, workflow gaps, and release priorities.

output_examples.input: Review the documents page from Aftrac's perspective.
output_examples.output: Aftrac would first look for clear upload status and certificate expiry guidance. The main friction would be uncertainty about which documents are complete and which still need action.

output_examples.input: Would Sirius recommend this onboarding flow to clients?
output_examples.output: Sirius would value speed, consistency, and client-ready presentation. They would likely question any unclear setup steps that could reduce confidence during client onboarding.

output_examples.input: Compare Aftrac and Sirius feedback on audit prep.
output_examples.output: Aftrac needs step-by-step guidance and progress clarity. Sirius needs faster evidence search, multi-client visibility, and outputs that support consultant credibility.

best_practices: Provide the feature, workflow, or screen being reviewed before asking for persona feedback.
Name the persona and scenario so the review focuses on a specific customer context.
Ask for prioritized recommendations when feedback will feed into product planning.
anti_patterns: Do not treat simulated feedback as a substitute for real customer validation.
Do not ask for broad product opinions without naming a persona or workflow.
Do not use the personas for products outside the LogiDocs Certify context without adapting assumptions.

faq.question: What personas does this skill support?
faq.answer: It supports Aftrac, an end-user persona, and Sirius, a consultant persona for ISO client work.

faq.question: Can it test live browser flows automatically?
faq.answer: No. It provides review methodology and prompts, but it does not run automated browser tests by itself.

faq.question: What types of feedback does it produce?
faq.answer: It can produce first impressions, positive observations, friction points, missing features, recommendations, and in-character quotes.

faq.question: Is this skill only for LogiDocs Certify?
faq.answer: Yes. The documented personas, scenarios, and examples are specific to LogiDocs Certify.

faq.question: Does it require other files?
faq.answer: The skill references separate Aftrac and Sirius persona agent files for detailed persona context.

faq.question: Who should use this skill?
faq.answer: Product managers, designers, customer success teams, and demo owners can use it before release or customer meetings.
